description: Supports 2.5 GT/s and 5.0 GT/s per lane with 8b/10b encoding; rate control via port logic
Single physical link operates as x1 or x2 lanes; automatic lane management
Controller boots or switches between RC and EP modes; software override supported
Type 0 in EP mode and Type 1 in RC mode; 32-bit accesses only
RC can access remote Type0 or Type1 config space through programmed setup
Application registers visible through BAR0 in EP and RC; top window also via config space
Programmable outbound regions with selectable window size and per-region offset
Four inbound regions with BAR match and offset to internal address
Dedicated 4 KB internal I/O space translated to remote I/O in RC mode only
Supports up to 32 MSI vectors with enable mask per group and status reporting
Legacy interrupt reception in RC and generation in EP; EOI handshake required
Write EOI with event number to signal completion to interrupt controller
Implements AER uncorrectable and correctable error logs with masks and severity
End-to-end CRC support for TLPs to improve integrity
Software enables or disables link training and monitors LTSSM state
Active state power management for L0s and L1 link states
Implements PCIe PM capability with PME signaling and control
RC can transmit PM_TURNOFF; EP can transmit PME via command bits
Module does not support L2 state; L2 entry is disabled or not functional
Reference clock drives SerDes PLL with programmable multiplier and lock status
Loopback available in RC mode for test and validation
Automatic polarity inversion handling on RX lanes
Hardware supports automatic lane reversal to ease routing
Global attributes for all outgoing TLPs to relax ordering and bypass cache coherency
Big-endian byte swap control for inbound and outbound paths with selectable modes
Hardware filtering for posted; non-posted; and completion traffic classes
Programmable completion lookup behavior with timeout handling
Max outbound payload 128 B and inbound payload 256 B; max read request size 256 B
Indicates presence of transactions in inbound or outbound paths for diagnostics
Software can initiate a downstream hot reset and manage warm reset flushing
Enumerates downstream devices and configures BARs after link up
BAR and MASK registers define aperture sizes for application mapping
Root control; status and slot capability registers are present in RC mode only

feature_name: Single virtual channel and traffic class
description: Only one VC and one TC are supported simplifying QoS behavior

feature_name: DMA via VBUSM master and slave
description: 128-bit master and slave interfaces support high bandwidth memory moves
All config and I/O accesses must be single 32-bit and non-cacheable
Inbound I/O space access is not supported in RC or EP mode
LTSSM state encoding exposed in debug registers to verify link state
Master privilege ID and priority levels can be set for initiator traffic
PCIe message TLPs are supported for system events and notifications
Automatic credit handling in the transaction layer for flow control
Data scrambling implemented to meet PCIe spec and EMI goals
Hardware straps select EP or RC; software can override default selection
Port logic provides control for transmitter swing levels in Gen2 mode
Error TLP headers are captured for post-mortem analysis in dedicated logs
